name: miniprogram-design-qa
description: GitHub-shared Codex skill and automation toolkit for native WeChat mini-program design QA with a repair-loop workflow.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/detect-project.mjs --help && node scripts/launch-devtools.mjs --help && node scripts/capture-devtools.mjs --help && node scripts/capture-miniprogram.mjs --help && node scripts/run-qa-pipeline.mjs --help && node scripts/normalize-images.mjs --help && node scripts/compare-images.mjs --help && node scripts/classify-findings.mjs --help && node scripts/build-report.mjs --help
